# matrix

**Instance Property**

The reflection matrix to apply to the normals of the submitted vertices.

## Declaration

```swift
var matrix: GLKMatrix3 { get set }
```

## Effect Properties

- **textureCubeMap**: The texture map to apply in the reflection stage.
